# FreelanceRateCalculator.net

> Free UK-focused freelance rate calculator with supporting pricing guides and tax tools.

This site helps freelancers calculate a sustainable hourly rate, understand UK market benchmarks for different disciplines, and estimate their tax liability. All tools are free, require no login, and run entirely in the browser.

## Primary tools

- [Freelance Rate Calculator](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/) — main calculator: income goal + expenses + hours → minimum hourly rate
- [UK Freelance Tax Calculator 2025/26](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/tools/uk-freelance-tax-calculator/) — income tax + Class 4 NI, Scottish rates, student loan, pension
- [IR35 Take-Home Calculator](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/ir35-and-freelance-rates/) — inside vs outside IR35 comparison with rate uplift guide
- [Tools index](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/tools/)

## Blog articles — UK rate benchmarks by profession

- [Freelance Web Developer Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-web-developer-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance Graphic Designer Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-graphic-designer-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance Copywriter Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-copywriter-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance SEO Consultant Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-seo-consultant-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance Photographer Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-photographer-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance Marketing Consultant Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-marketing-consultant-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance UX Designer Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-ux-designer-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance Accountant Rates UK 2026](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-accountant-rates-uk/)

## Blog articles — pricing strategy

- [Freelance Pricing & Rates Blog](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/)
- [Freelance Day Rate vs Hourly Rate](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/day-rate-vs-hourly-rate/)
- [The Freelancer's Guide to Billable Hours](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/billable-hours-guide/)
- [How to Raise Your Freelance Rates Without Losing Clients](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/how-to-raise-freelance-rates/)
- [IR35 and Freelance Rates: Inside vs Outside Take-Home](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/ir35-and-freelance-rates/)

## Optional

For smaller context windows, prioritise the calculator page and any one article most relevant to the user's role (e.g. developer, designer, copywriter, contractor) or tax situation (IR35, self-assessment).
